topIndia.title: AI market likely to split between premium frontier models and lower-cost alternatives: Bernstein
topIndia.summary: The global artificial intelligence (AI) market is likely to evolve into a two-tier structure, with premium frontier AI models serving highly specialised use cases while lower-cost models dominate mainstream applications, according to a report by Bernstein.

events.summary: arXiv:2606.19118v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electricity markets are inherently complex systems characterised by strong nonlinearities, high-dimensional interactions, and increasing interdependence across regions. While deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated strong p…

events.title: China's Z.ai GLM-5.2 tops OpenAI’s GPT 5.5 model on key benchmarks
events.summary: Chinese startup Z.ai has launched GLM-5.2, a powerful AI model for complex coding projects. This new large language model boasts a massive 1 million token context window, allowing it to handle extensive software development tasks. GLM-5.2 is available under an open-source lice…

events.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
events.summary: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

items.title: AI market likely to split between premium frontier models and lower-cost alternatives: Bernstein
items.summary: The global artificial intelligence (AI) market is likely to evolve into a two-tier structure, with premium frontier AI models serving highly specialised use cases while lower-cost models dominate mainstream applications, according to a report by Bernstein.

items.title: The future of AI may be small, cheap and unprofitable: Joachim Klement
items.summary: A groundbreaking study indicates that lightweight AI models installed on everyday home computers are on the verge of surpassing the robust systems found in data centers. This pivotal change may drive down costs and profit margins for industry leaders such as Anthropic and Open…

items.title: Donald Trump says Apple to partner with Intel on US chip design, production
items.summary: A partnership with Intel helps Apple diversify its manufacturing base as it seeks additional ‌chip capacity. The ⁠iPhone ⁠maker relies heavily on TSMC, whose advanced production lines are in high ​demand from AI chipmakers such as Nvidia and AMD.

items.title: Why Rebuilding Telecom Infrastructure Is Critical For Next Wave Of Voice AI
items.summary: India’s digital ecosystem is undergoing a massive shift as enterprises move from text-heavy apps to conversational voice interfaces. The commercial…

items.title: At G7, PM Modi warns against misuse of AI
items.summary: At the G7 summit, Prime Minister Narendra Modi warned that unchecked AI could expose children to misinformation, deepfakes and exploitation, urging global cooperation to build safe, human-centric AI systems.

items.title: Google bets on Gemini AI to reinvent the smart speaker with new Google Home device
Bengaluru ranks second in Asia for AI Innovation
items.summary: Bengaluru has strengthened its position as a global startup and AI hub, ranking second in Asia for AI-native startups and entering the global top 10 for performance and R&D in the Global Startup Ecosystem Report (GSER) 2026.

items.title: Andhra Pradesh govt to launch Amaravati quantum and AI innovation centre
items.summary: Andhra Pradesh is launching the Amaravati quantum and AI innovation Centre with IBM. This initiative aims to create India's largest quantum problem-solving force. The centre will connect industry challenges with academic talent and global technology expertise. It will accelera…

careers.note: Demand snapshot for 2026. ML Engineer is the most in-demand AI title; agentic-AI and deep-learning skills carry the highest pay premiums; Python + one cloud is the baseline. Specialisation beats generalisation for freshers.

paths.note: #1 AI title — build, deploy & maintain models in production. Best all-round entry into AI.
RAG, tool-use & multi-agent systems. ~40% of enterprise apps will embed AI agents by year-end.
Neural nets for vision & speech. Highest premiums; usually needs strong maths / grad study.
Ship & scale models on the cloud. Cloud AI certs add 20–25% to salary.
Foundational, widest entry door; a reliable first step into AI.
Imaging, robotics, autonomous systems, medical AI.
Powers chatbots, search & agents — the hottest application area.
5–8 yrs experience; $140k–$332k bands. Translates AI into business value.
Alignment, evals, red-teaming & policy — newer but expanding fast.

fresher.why: The lingua franca of ML — non-negotiable.
Linear algebra, probability & calculus — enough to reason about models.
Regression, classification, evaluation, the ML workflow.
Build & train neural nets; PyTorch dominates research & jobs.
Ship a small LLM app — the most visible skill to recruiters now.
Real AI work is mostly data; SQL is everywhere.
AWS leads (~40% of postings), then Azure & GCP. Version everything.
A deployed project that solves a real problem is the #1 differentiator.

experienced.why: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, model/versioning — production is where value lives.
Multi-agent orchestration, tool-use, evals — the surging frontier.
AWS/Azure/GCP architecture; certs add a 20–25% salary premium.
Adapt, measure and harden models for a domain.
Cost & latency engineering for large models.
Trade-offs across data, latency, cost & reliability at scale.
CV, NLP, recsys, healthcare — depth beats breadth at senior levels.
Leading teams and tying models to measurable outcomes.

profile.name: Harman Singh Sandhu
profile.blurb: I build AI/ML projects and write about them. This site is one of them — an automated daily AI digest.

repos.desc: My personalized AI newsletter that runs on an agentic AI

repos.name: Ace-rentals
repos.desc: Ace Rentals: A full-stack property rental platform built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Features user authentication, image uploads, geocoding, reviews, and secure account management. Inspired by Airbnb.
